corcept-mcp.description: corcept hook governance + audit ledger MCP server. Exposes 9 tools: corcept_doctor, corcept_hook_session_start, corcept_hook_user_prompt_submit, corcept_hook_pretool_guard, corcept_hook_posttool_audit, corcept_hook_stop_check, corcept_audit_verify, corcept_export_cloudevents, corcept_key_generate, corcept_memory_promote.
corcept-mcp.note: Merge into ~/.claude/pai-axiom/mcp-servers.json or the axiom runtime MCP config. The corcept-mcp binary must be on PATH (cargo install --path crates/corcept-mcp) or specified as an absolute path.
